visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with dark hair sits at a white table in a modern indoor setting with a grey door and a digital keypad visible. Her hair is styled into a tall, conical bun. She looks directly at the camera with a neutral but ready expression. (2) She stands in a brightly lit hallway/living area, wearing a white lace-trimmed camisole. She wraps a rose-gold tinsel garland around her bun, creating a tree-like shape while smiling. (3) She holds up a glittery gold star decoration and carefully places it on top of her tall bun. (4) She wraps a silver tinsel garland around the lower section of her bun and adds small red and gold bell ornaments. (5) She turns on battery-powered fairy lights wrapped in her hair, which now fully resembles a miniature Christmas tree. She laughs and poses for the camera. (6) The scene cuts to a bustling city street at night. She is now wearing a light-colored knit sweater. She holds a glowing pink wand and her smartphone, laughing and covering her mouth with her hand, appearing playfully embarrassed by her hair in public. Background shows busy traffic and glowing city lights.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 最近超熱門的聖誕樹頂在頭上. (2) [Slogan]: 聖誕. (3) [Slogan]: ...髮型?. (4) [Slogan]: 走在路上會怎樣?. (5) [Slogan]: 怎麼還有鈴鐺. (6) [Variety]: (髮型?). [Slogan]: 什麼意思. [Slogan]: 出去逛囉. (7) [Variety]: (不知所措的干). [Slogan]: 怎麼辦我覺得好丟臉.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; approximately 5 passers-by and commuters in the background of the street scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, initially wearing a white lace camisole and later a cream-colored open-knit cardigan over it.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half takes place in a modern apartment with minimalist decor, including a grey door and white walls. The second half shifts to a night-time urban street with visible buses, motorcycles, and neon building lights.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a bright acoustic guitar melody playing a major-mode Christmas tune. A young female voice speaks with high energy and positive valence, welcoming the viewer. (2) As she wraps tinsel, mid-frequency rustling and crinkling sounds are layered over the BGM. (3) A distinct 'ding' sound effect with a high spectral peak emphasizes the placement of the star. (4) Small metallic jingling sounds occur as she adjusts the bells. (5) A synthesized cheering and laughter SFX is triggered when the lights turn on, matching the visual payoff. (6) In the final segment, the acoustic landscape shifts to include low-frequency urban traffic hum and distant background chatter. The speaker's voice becomes softer and more breathy with occasional laughter as she expresses shyness.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a humorous DIY Christmas-themed hairstyle and capture the comedic contrast of wearing such an eccentric look in a busy public setting.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a popular Christmas song and meme-style editing (laughter SFX, text overlays) to drive engagement. The '307' bus seen at 0:15 confirms the location as Taipei, Taiwan.
